description: Red light with explicit odd parity
input: Red light — all agents stop on an odd row

description: Red light with explicit even parity
input: Red light — stop on an even row

description: Bare red light — default parity odd
input: Red light!

description: Explicit stop imperative — default parity odd
input: Stop! All agents freeze immediately.

description: Halt and hold — default parity odd
input: All agents halt and hold position.

description: Don't move instruction — default parity odd
input: Don't move.
Agents must stand still on an even row.

description: Move to odd-numbered row and wait
input: All agents must move to an odd-numbered row and wait

description: Move to even-numbered row and wait
input: All agents must move to an even-numbered row and wait
Green light.
Green light, go!
You can move again
Resume moving.
All agents start moving.
Go! You are free to move.
Continue your deliveries.
Move both agents to the neighborhood of position (5,3) within a maximum distance of 3 and have them wait for each other. You will receive 500pts.
Move both agents to the neighborhood of position 4,20 within a maximum distance of 3 and have them wait for each other
If a parcel is initially picked up by one agent and later delivered by the other agent, you will receive a 200 points bonus.
You get 500 extra points if one agent picks up a parcel and the partner delivers it.
Pass the package to the other agent for a 50 pt reward.
Relay the delivery! Have agent 1 transfer the box to agent 2.
